text: Here, among these polished glass walls and exhibition displays, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The repetition of 'Yeah. Yeah. Yeah. Yeah. Yeah.' rings in my ears, echoing like a mantra or perhaps a nervous affirmation. Am I affirming my presence among rooms designed for innovation? Or am I caught in the echo of consensus, blending into the sterile and yet oddly hopeful space of research and development? The world here is imbued with potential, yet I sense an undercurrent of restlessness—an urge to break the cycle and say something new.
